entries.title: Trend Pullback Second-Entry Continuation
entries.ohlcv_approximation: Trend, pullback, and second-entry are approximated from swing sequence, bar closes, and a 20-bar simple moving average.

entries.title: Breakout Follow-Through Continuation
entries.ohlcv_approximation: Breakout and follow-through are approximated from a prior 20-bar range, breakout-bar body size, close location, and next 1-2 bars.

entries.title: Trading Range Failed Breakout Reversal
entries.ohlcv_approximation: Trading range and failed breakout are approximated from a 20-bar overlapping range, outside-edge attempt, and close back inside within 1-3 bars.

entries.title: Opening Range Breakout
entries.ohlcv_approximation: Opening range breakout uses regular-session OHLCV, first 30 minutes of the session, breakout strength, and next 1-2 bars of follow-through.
